item.title: BANANA BREAD COFFEE CAKE 🍌 INGREDIENTS For the streusel -3/4...
item.description:
BANANA BREAD COFFEE CAKE 🍌 INGREDIENTS For the streusel -3/4 cup all purpose flour -5 tbsp brown sugar -1/4 cup granulated sugar -2 tsp cinnamon -Pinch of salt -5 tbsp unsalted butter, cold and cubed For the cinnamon swirl -1/2 cup brown sugar -1 and 1/2 tsp cinnamon For the batter -3 very ripe bananas -1/2 cup unsalted butter -1/2 cup brown sugar -1/4 cup granulated sugar -2 eggs -1 tsp vanilla extract -1/4 cup full fat sour cream -1 and 3/4 cups all purpose flour -1 tsp baking soda -1/2 tsp baking powder -1/2 tsp cinnamon -1/2 tsp fine salt For the glaze -1 cup powdered sugar -2 to 3 tbsp milk -1/2 tsp vanilla extract
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
